source: Cambridge Prepare 2nd Edition Level 1 (A1) — Teacher's Book
extracted_by: Claude Opus 4.7 (vision OCR from local PDF, 2026-05-19)
purpose: Hard wordlist + grammar constraint for Stage 3 content writer. Each unit's `target_vocab` and `target_grammar` define what the lesson MUST teach explicitly; anything outside these lists is curriculum scope creep. `passive_vocab` may appear in passages for context but is not explicitly taught here.
design_rule: Stage 3 Unit N content must match Prepare Level 1 Unit N — same topic, same vocab scope, same grammar target. Passages/scripts are original (IP boundary); wordlist + grammar are not.

units.title: In the classroom
target_grammar: this / that / these / those (demonstratives, singular and plural)
units.speaking_topic: Asking and answering questions about personal details
units.notes: Pre-Unit. Establishes basic CYL toolkit. Used as warm-up before Unit 1 proper.

units.title: All about me
units.topic: Me, my things and my nationality
target_grammar: Determiners — singular and plural (a/the, no article)
be — singular and plural (I am, you are, he/she/it is, we are, they are)
units.pronunciation: Word stress in long words (nationalities like Brazilian, Japanese)
units.reading_topic: A web page introducing yourself + 'Tell us about you' student profiles

units.title: My family
target_grammar: Determiners — possessive (my, your, his, her, its, our, their)
be — short answers (Yes, I am. / No, I'm not. / Yes, he is. / No, she isn't.)
units.pronunciation: /ə/ schwa (mum, brother, son, father, mother, parents)
units.reading_topic: A web page describing members of a family (names, ages, relationships)
units.listening_topic: A conversation about feelings (using the feelings adjectives in context)
units.speaking_topic: Asking and answering personal questions ('Are you OK?' 'How old are you?')
units.writing_topic: A web page to describe a person in your family
do_not_include_words_here_belong_to_late: twin (as taught vocab; appears as passive context only)
photo (as taught vocab; appears as passive context only, taught in Unit 1)

validation_rules.scope_creep_check: If unit_breakdown.do_not_include_words_here_belong_to_later_units lists a word, the generated content must NOT teach it as target vocab in this unit.
validation_rules.grammar_one_focus_rule: Each lesson within a unit targets exactly one of the unit's target_grammar items. Lesson 4 (review) recycles all.
validation_rules.ip_boundary: Passages and listening scripts must be ORIGINAL writing using the wordlist + grammar; never verbatim Prepare passage content.
validation_rules.anchor_characters_optional: The 'anchor_characters_in_prepare_passages' field is informational only — content writer MAY use the same names so a student recognises them from class, but DOES NOT reproduce Prepare's specific dialogue or passage text.
